title: CodeGrind: Speed, AI Guidance, and New Auth in Practice
summary: Showcase CodeGrind's fast, AI-assisted DSA practice with an emphasis on the new Google authentication integration and real-time AI guidance.
core_message: CodeGrind blends LeetCode-style challenges with Azure OpenAI-powered guidance and a refreshed Google authentication flow for quick, secure access. Practice problems faster, get AI-assisted hints, and track progress in a cyberpunk-inspired learning playground.
cta: Try a quick challenge now and sign in with Google to unlock AI-assisted hints.
visual_brief: A short 20-45 second looped video: show the CodeGrind editor in action solving a problem, AI assistant panel giving hints, and a smooth Google sign-in flow. Include subtle cyberpunk UI flourishes and a quick highlight of the Google Sign-In button.

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.
